title: Roughly Clientsided
description: Adding better sounds, auto sort, performance mods, a minimap, some network optimization and more.
body:
This Modpack will add a lot of mods for a better minecraft experience when playing on vanilla server.

By adding better sounds, auto sort, performance mods, a minimap, some network optimization mods and much more.

And every thing is client side only, so you can still  play on normal vanilla servers.
